modality: ENUM: [GENERAL, SCI_TECH, SOCIAL_SCI, ACADEMIC_APPLIED] or null

tag_interest_scores.desc: 1-5 for tags inside kc with 4-5 rating

difficulty_trend: ENUM: [STABLE, INCREASING, DECREASING, MIXED], trend inside a session
challenge_preference: ENUM: [SAFE, BALANCED, CHALLENGING], how often sample is near upper or lower bound
repetition_preference: ENUM: [LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH], how often a session reuse same KC/tag
